breakpoint.$description: Tier 1 responsive breakpoints. Mobile-first: each is a min-width for @media queries.

maxWidth.$description: Tier 1 content max-widths per breakpoint. Mobile is intentionally fluid (100%) and has no entry.

columns.$description: Tier 1 grid column counts per breakpoint.

sidebar.$description: Tier 1 sidebar navigation widths: full panel and collapsed rail.
